repository_state.head: 4fe10683ed4e4ecb85482c7a7a71dc08a84d4a83
repository_state.note: This freezes the benchmark data scope while implementation work remains uncommitted. The evaluated implementation must be frozen separately before data access or scoring.

state.reason: The adapter, implementation, reader, judge, provider, retry, cost, and final success rules are not frozen.

claim_semantics.allowed_label: LongMemEval-V2 full scope precommitted before an answer-bearing local dataset download or NarratorDB adapter/run; public-answer and blind to this NarratorDB development process under the documented audit, not globally secret.
eligible_as: a public-answer benchmark scope selected before NarratorDB development against it
a third-party-run blind evaluation if a custodian keeps answer-bearing files outside the NarratorDB process
not_eligible_as: proof against exposure through model pretraining, browser caches, other machines, or people
an official leaderboard score before the exact official submission-compatible protocol is frozen and completed

dataset_scope.variant_reporting: small and medium must be reported separately; neither may be silently substituted or omitted after results are observed

core_files.sha256_provenance: Official Hugging Face tree metadata lfs.oid.
Official Hugging Face tree metadata lfs.oid.

dataset_scope.immutability_rule: The full 451-question universe, both named variants, dataset revision, and official file hashes cannot be changed by a later amendment.

access_attestation.scope: Actions in this research/precommit process plus repository-visible files; this is not an audit of browser caches, provider systems, other machines, model pretraining, or human memory.
metadata_inspected: official README, schema, license, repository, and leaderboard documentation
official Hugging Face dataset-card, revision, file-size, Git LFS, and checksum metadata
local filenames, exact file sizes, binary-text matches, and reachable Git history

prior_local_use_audit.audit_scope: Current repository tree including ignored and binary files plus reachable Git paths, content history, and blob sizes at precommit time.
prior_local_use_audit.only_current_reference: BENCHMARKS.md marks LongMemEval-V2 as planned and not scored.
prior_local_use_audit.conclusion: No local LongMemEval-V2 dataset, adapter, output, or score was found. The only repository reference says planned and not scored. This supports blind-to-this-development-process, not globally hidden.

official_evaluation_status.note: The released questions contain public reference answers and evaluator declarations. The public leaderboard package is self-run; this artifact does not guess an adapter, aggregate metric, judge configuration, or 95% rule.

requirements: A later hash-stable protocol artifact must reference this artifact and its published SHA-256.
Every unresolved field must be frozen before an answer-bearing dataset download, adapter development against dataset rows, or scored run.
The later artifact may not change the frozen question universe, variants, revision, or hashes.
Any failed, timed-out, or malformed item must remain in the denominator under the frozen failure policy.

third_party_validation_requirements: A neutral custodian fetches the pinned official dataset revision and verifies every official checksum before evaluation.
Reference answers and evaluator-only fields remain outside the NarratorDB process; NarratorDB receives only protocol-permitted trajectories and questions.
The custodian runs the frozen NarratorDB commit or container and the pinned official harness without post-result code changes.
The custodian records hashes for every input, system output, evaluator output, log, model identifier, provider request identifier, retry, failure, token count, and cost.
The signed result bundle includes all 451 question IDs and reports small and medium separately.
Released outputs can be re-scored deterministically; hosted-model generation variance is reported under the precommitted rerun policy.
